nasb.text: When they came to their father Jacob in the land of Canaan, they told him all that had happened to them, saying,

esv.text: When they came to Jacob their father in the land of Canaan, they told him all that had happened to them, saying,

cnv.text: 他們回到迦南地他們的父親雅各那裡，把他們遭遇的一切事都告訴了他，說：

ccb.text: 他们回到迦南父亲雅各那里，把事情的经过告诉了他，

csbs.text: 他们回到迦南地，到了父亲雅各那里，把他们遇到的一切事都告诉了他，说：
